feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Im allowed to go hunting soon Should I go after boars ducks, rabbits or bucks

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: dearest memesters, I have made the difficult decision to end my daily corn posts…
entry.content: dearest memesters, I have made the difficult decision to end my daily corn posts. This is purely due to personal reasons so please don't blame anyone else for it. I'm glad I could enjoy the last few years with my fellow corn lovers. Thank you and goodbye Your fortune: Better not tell you now

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Making my own MMO server cause you are all worthless
entry.content: Fuck you and fuck modern video games. I'm done. To anyone that used to play Lineage 2 in the past(mostly eastern eurofags), I've been working for over a year on recreating a server that was exactly like the old L2Pride on Interlude. 2007 Version. Customized and PvP heavy, meaning that we expect a lot of players to make this viable. Will also feature a custom race war system along with rewards for castle owners and more If you are interested join the discord here: https://discord.com/invite/2Knae

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Endings That Make You Think
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-fK bzX7-I2Y >Amanda falls unconscious, and later awakens on a gurney. Several doctors, in protective hazmat suits, inform her that she is in a hospital and they will help her. The doctors reveal that the "creatures" were escaped patients, and after realizing that Amanda "knows too much," she is then forced into a dark cell and is swarmed by the recaptured patients, as the doctor closes the door's viewing shutter.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The award for the most faggotized technology goes to
entry.content: You buy 22 cores but can only use 8 or 6 at a time, what’s the point in that? And the rest are some ‘power-saving’ ones. Instead of having fixed cores like AMD, where you use all of them that you actually paid for

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is this game worth playing? I wanna give it a chance but within the span of 4 ho…
entry.content: Is this game worth playing? I wanna give it a chance but within the span of 4 hours ive only gotten into two battles. the amount of dialog is kinda insane, it doesnt help that its presented in the most uninteresting way possible even old ass final fantasy games would at least have portraits for the character talking. does it getter better or is this just the game?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >so....take us through my divorce. >your divorce? oh man, I mean, what can you s…
entry.content: >so....take us through my divorce. >your divorce? oh man, I mean, what can you say, it was definitely a divorce. There have been a lot of divorces in the last few months, so like any other year it would have been a divorce of the year contender, but it...it definitely was still the best divorce of the weekend. I guess the deal is, your wife, she, like, was sick, I mean, basically she was sick of your bullshit. Yeah, it's like, you know, you bought her a yoga studio, a beach house, a vanity chari

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Linus Torvalds only uses email and Git now.
entry.content: https://www.zdnet.com/article/open- source-summit-linus-torvalds/ >Torvalds no longer sees himself as a programmer. "Let's be entirely honest. I hardly read code at all anymore. I'm not a programmer, I'm a development lead." >He said he dives into code mainly when something forces his attention, like build breaks or merge conflicts: "I've done so many conflict resolutions over the years that I could probably do them in my sleep… Quite often at that point, when I look at the code, I sometimes fin

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Alien Earth season 2 will be weird, urgent and relevant
entry.content: >Here’s what I can tell you — shit’s gonna get weird. I’ve read the first six [episodes], and they’re really, really, really good. It’s just the best of Noah Hawley. Surprising, wonderful characters, rich world. I feel like it’s just matured into a really dynamic story — relevant and urgent and funny and fucked up.” https://www.avpgalaxy.net/2026/06/2 4/alien-earth-season-2-is-gonna-get -weird-says-timothy-olyphant/

entry.title: /news/ News: Man deported from Minnesota weeks after being pardoned by Gov. Walz to avoid removal
entry.content: https://www.kare11.com/article/news /local/ice-in-minnesota/man-deporte d-from-minnesota-weeks-after-being- pardoned-by-gov-walz-to-avoid-remov al/89-d4d1f9e8-37ba-4993-807f-a2309 e6c9782 ST PAUL, Minn. — The U.S. Department of Homeland Security announced Friday morning has deported a Minnesota man convicted of criminal sexual abuse of a minor 20 years ago, despite a pardon last month by Gov. Tim Walz and other top state officials. The statement said 42-year-old Tou Lue Vang was arrested by U.S.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Ads
entry.content: People hate ads on the internet, but without them we wouldn't had many of the "free" services we use daily, imagine if you needed to pay to access most websites or online services, many times you'd use them only once and never return, it's the same as those paywalled articles, no one wants to pay, even if it's only a symbolic price. I think it's a fair trade, let all the normies watch ads so services can make money, while we /g/ 1337 h4x0rs use adblockers. It's ugly, but this is one of the best

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Women are resetting their body counts in Brazil
entry.content: Western women are flying to Brazil en masse to gain access to a new Body Count reset technology. According to the source, it uses a form of Balinese healing that essentially returns to body to its factory-default virgin status. How can men cope after this? Making western women virgins again will essentially make their status sky rocket in the dating market

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Isn't piracy dying?
entry.content: I see many people saying that piracy is thriving, consumers backlashing against greedy companies, abandon subscription services and resort to piracy but in reality I see the opposite. Sites are closing one after another (especially rom, emulation and anime sites), torrents are slowly dying, storage is becoming unaffordable, burners are out of production. Piracy was huge because of cheap storage (hdds, optical burners, high quality discs) and high percentage of pc users and tech savvy enthusiasts

entry.title: /int/ International: Over 500 children in peru named Haaland
entry.content: >The Norwegian football star's success has led to a flood of children being named after him, reports the Peruvian outlet RPP. The state registry office, Reniec, stated in a press release that the Norwegian's name appears in various forms: 4 have been given the full name, Erling Braut Haaland. 91 have been given the name Erling Haaland. 468 have been given the name Haaland. In total, 563 children have been named after the Norwegian striker.

entry.title: /int/ International: >Whatever, in the showers at the gym I realized I had a really small dick. I mea…
entry.content: >Whatever, in the showers at the gym I realized I had a really small dick. I measured it when I got home—it was twelve centimeters, maybe thirteen or fourteen if you measured right to the base. I'd found something new to worry about, something I couldn't do anything about; it was a basic and permanent handicap. It was around then that I started hating blacks. >There weren't many of them in the school—most of them went to the technical high school, Lycée Pierre-de-Coubertin, where the eminent Def

entry.content: get a job

entry.title: /b/ Random: Indian Scammers
entry.content: So yeah, this number is from a company claiming to be the "Lily May Group" - what it really is, is a bunch of Indian guys telling you their name is Ryan Miller and asking for name and social security info. Its basically a phishing scam targeting old people. Ive been calling them til they blocked me. Even just calling the number, your phone service carrier will warn you the number is suspected of fraud and to hang up. > every minute they're on the phone with you is another minute they're not scam

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Master Duel thread, because we haven't had one in a while and I'm not even going…
entry.content: Master Duel thread, because we haven't had one in a while and I'm not even going to bother doing a stealth thread, I want to discuss the game and share decklists. New pack yesterday featuring the new Fairy Tail cards, Predaplant and Tellarknight support and the new town's bicycle Fydraulis Harmonia. Killer Tune was also hit and Instant Fusion was released from the banlist. Are you building any new decks?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Lot's of happenings with Firefox this week. Since Mozilla is trying to deal with…
entry.content: Lot's of happenings with Firefox this week. Since Mozilla is trying to deal with the influx of users from the manifest v3 fallout they is doing a lot of new strategies. First Firefox is switching to the "two more weeks" update model with alternating feature releases and bug fix releases, with the first two weekly updates happening in September. It is also extending the legacy ESR 115 release yet again to March 2027, as 5% of users are still using Windows 7 and more still using Intel Macs. Then M

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PC Building General
entry.content: >UPGRADE & BUILD ADVICE Post build list or current specs: https://pcpartpicker.com/ Provide specific use cases State BUDGET and COUNTRY or you will NOT be helped >CASE mATX: AP201, Lian Li A3, O11 Air Mini, XT M3, CH260 ATX: XT PRO (ULTRA), AIR 903 Base/MAX, Lancool 217, Flux Pro, Meshify 3, 4000D FRAME, X50 Dual Chamber: Y60/70, O11 Vision, Antec C8 >CPU Gaming: 250K, 14600K, 7/9600X, 7/9800X3D -Budget: 225F, 7500F, 12600K Workstation: 270K, 9950X3D *Avoid Asrock motherboards on AM5 *On Raptor

Like some seem to be only slightly modified pictures from Darkweb or gore sites. NB4 >"Cus you told it to you tard!!!" entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: You can't force or bump niceness on this board. It has to come from the communit…
entry.content: You can't force or bump niceness on this board. It has to come from the community itself—that's what makes this place special. It has to be organic. People won't always agree. Sometimes discussions get heated, and sometimes people are anything but nice. That's part of any real community. The value of making OC and choosing to be kind is that it comes from the people, not because one person decided everyone has to live by a certain code. The moment kindness becomes something imposed from the top

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The next time you buy an airplane ticket, just ask for an upgrade. Pay a little …
entry.content: The next time you buy an airplane ticket, just ask for an upgrade. Pay a little extra money. Fly first class. What it does is it conditions your mind. Once you get in first class and you see how wide the seats are, and you find out why they shut that curtain.. see, because they shut that curtain because they can't let you see what's going on up there. They're passing out hot nuts. Everybody gets a washcloth. They got a menu. You get to decide what you want. All the drinks are free. Once you sit

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Do you think channers hate women and have no success with them because they expe…
entry.content: Do you think channers hate women and have no success with them because they expect them to be their mothers? Often the kind of talk I hear here makes me think you want a woman who gives you the same soothing feeling as when you were a baby. The reality is women are adults and you're not going to get that baby soothing feeling. Do you think you're still just a baby and want to be looked after like one but don't realise it and that's why the relationships never work?

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: why arent you opening the door
entry.content: why arent you opening the door

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Nobody's coming to save you, big dog. Don't you get that? Your whole life has le…
entry.content: Nobody's coming to save you, big dog. Don't you get that? Your whole life has led to this point because of you. Your shitty decisions, your fucked up habits, your poor choices have caused you to end up at this point. The only person, big dog, that's going to get you out of this spot is you. No more excuses. No more coming up with reasons why you can't. Get focused, get ferocious. It's time to level up. Let's go.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: If I was a blond boy like picrel with Anglo-Saxon/Scandinavian features, every g…
entry.content: If I was a blond boy like picrel with Anglo-Saxon/Scandinavian features, every girl at school would be like: "I want to date him." "He's so gorgeous." "He's the school prince." Nazis weren't wrong about beauty. They were wrong for killing Slavs, because they are pretty too.
